name: Urban Buildings India
description: Building footprint polygons for urban areas across Indian states and UTs. Aggregated from AMRUT/Bhuvan, GSDL Delhi, VEDAS, NESDR, and other sources. 84 assets covering states/UTs across India (~9 GB total).

source.name: ramSeraph/indian_buildings (urban release)
source.authority: ramSeraph; upstream: AMRUT, Bhuvan, GSDL Delhi, VEDAS, NESDR
